name: Project Vault
description: Tactical ledger desktop app. Arasaka HUD aesthetic, multi-vault management, PDF export, WAL SQLite.

name: BitChess
description: Neo-brutalist 8-bit chess terminal. Minimax AI with Alpha-Beta pruning, blitz timers, live PGN logs.

name: Heartly
description: Smart weekly meal planner. Drag & drop, allergy-aware, auto-generate 21 meals, shareable URL.

name: Proto Hair
description: AR hair color prototype — Try Before You Dye. Mock camera, before/after slider, dark theme.

name: BISINDO Mobile
description: Indonesian Sign Language mobile app. Collaborative project.

name: Lap-On v2
description: Lap-On Indonesia platform v2. Collaborative org project.

name: PKUMI Portal
description: A writing platform for the members of the Istiqlal Mosque Ulama Cadre Education. Sharing knowledge, Islamic treasures, and writings that are useful for the community.

name: WenPay
description: Crypto-native payment platform. Spend SOL instantly on gift cards, game top-ups & subscriptions. Wallet connect only — no KYC, no account.

name: Simulasi Kontainer
description: Simulation algorithm for optimal arrangement of goods in a container with visualization of packing results.

name: PMB PKUMI
description: Official Portal for New Student Admissions of the Mosque Istiqlal Ulama Cadre Education (PKUMI). Seize the opportunity for a full LPDP scholarship at PTIQ University Jakarta.
